text.title: Regulatory Compliance 2026 Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: SaaS dashboard with web + iOS surfaces serving US and EU markets. Shows surface inventory, regulation mapping, statement publication, and remediation backlog.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Company AcmeOps ships a SaaS dashboard via app.acmeops.com (web) and com.acmeops.ios (native). Active markets: United States + European Union. Pre-launch review for v3.0.

section.title: Step 2 — Regulation matrix
section.note: Earliest binding deadline = EAA 2025-06-28 → that is the constraint for v3.0 ship date.

section.title: Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Statement publishes 2026-05-23. Remediation tickets land in Jira with WCAG SC IDs. Next review scheduled 2026-08-23 (quarterly) and at v3.1 release.
